tool.name: Amazon Q Business
tool.description: Enterprise business assistant with many data connectors and the lowest entry pricing in this segment.
tool.logoNotes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Q (`Arch_Amazon-Q_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused because AWS presents these surfaces as Amazon Q variants rather than with separate public per-variant icons.
tool.practitionerNote: Useful when enterprises want a connector-heavy internal assistant with AWS alignment, especially if a lower entry price matters for broad rollout.

dataResidency.detail: Primary-region storage; cross-region inference stays within geography; in-country needs AWS Support.

deployment.detail: SaaS on AWS with 40+ connectors; no self-hosted option.

auditLogging.detail: CloudTrail integration for all Q Business (and Q Apps) API calls.

soc2.detail: Amazon Q Business in scope for AWS SOC 1/2/3.

iso42001.detail: Amazon Q Business listed in AWS ISO 42001 scope.

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.
